summary: Plan-only remediation assessment completed for five open PRs. No merge is recommended because no candidate has complete merge preflight proof. One narrow repair artifact is proposed for #92072, #92243 is scoped to central security routing, and #78964 needs maintainer review because it is broad, waiting on author, has failed checks, and has unresolved Codex bot review context.

actions.reason: Standalone PR remains viable but is not merge-ready under the merge policy without current mergeability and Codex /review preflight.
Docs change is independent and small, but failed checks block merge recommendation.
Maintainer judgment is needed because the PR is broad, author-followup-labeled, has unresolved automated review context, and has failed checks.
A concrete repair path exists: update the contributor branch or replacement branch narrowly around gateway model image-capability handling and rerun targeted tests plus check:changed.
Security-sensitive PR is out of scope for Clownfish backlog automation and should route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Build a cluster-scoped repair artifact for the narrow #92072 gateway fix path.

needs_human: #78964 requires maintainer judgment before merge or repair because it is broad, labeled waiting on author, has failed checks, and has unresolved Codex bot review context.
